ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector for classification of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the company's initial public offering (IPO) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock associated with the price */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock for the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock for the day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price for dividends and splits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, price decrease) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the alert is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "base_year" INTEGER /* Base year of the index */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the index */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the index (e.g., S&P Dow Jones) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_prices" (
  "index_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index price entry */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market index */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the index price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the index */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the index for the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the index for the day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the index */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price for dividends and splits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_prices_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the news is related to */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date_published" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the session is logged */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  "is_holiday" INTEGER /* Whether the trading session occurred on a holiday or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite stock entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who favorited the stock */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock that is favorited */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date the stock was added to favorites */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_favorites_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the prediction is made */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the stock */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Machine learning model used for the prediction */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (0.0 - 1.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_index_membership" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock that is a member of the index */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market index the stock is a member of */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date the stock was added to the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_index_membership_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_index_membership_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock that underwent a split */,
  "split_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock split */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio (e.g., 2-for-1, 3-for-2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_splits_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
